title: Total Solar Eclipse
description: A total solar eclipse will be visible across parts of the Arctic, Greenland, Iceland, and Spain.

title: Perseid Meteor Shower Peak
description: The Perseid meteor shower, one of the most spectacular meteor showers of the year, reaches its peak.

title: Partial Lunar Eclipse
description: A partial lunar eclipse will be visible from Europe, Africa, North America, and South America.

title: Jupiter-Saturn Conjunction
description: Jupiter and Saturn will appear exceptionally close in the night sky, a rare celestial alignment.

title: Venus at Greatest Eastern Elongation
description: Venus will be at its greatest angular distance east of the Sun, making it highly visible after sunset.
